resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def kIncreasing(self, arr: List[int], k: int) -> int:
        n = len(arr)
        res = 0
        for i in range(k, n):
            if arr[i] < arr[i-k]:
                res += arr[i-k] - arr[i]
                arr[i] = arr[i-k]
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution iterates through the array, checking if each element is less than the k-th previous element. If so, it increments the result by the difference and updates the current element to be equal to the k-th previous element. This approach ensures the array becomes K-increasing in a single pass.
